name: Seasoned Potatoes (Korean)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and slice them into matchstick pieces. Place in cold water to prevent browning.
2. Drain the potatoes and place them in a saucepan with just enough water to barely cover the potatoes. Bring to a boil and cook until tender, 3 to 4 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, combine soy sauce, sugar, minced garlic, sesame seeds, sesame oil, and scallion in a bowl.
4. Drain the cooked potatoes well and add them to the soy sauce mixture. Toss well.
5. Serve 4.
